review_title: A Must-Have Tool for SEOs. Keyword Clustering Feature is a BOMB
description: A very useful tool. It may seem a bit non-intuitive for use from the start, but this problem disappears after using SpySERP for 1 day. Accurate rank-tracking, nice reporting, really awesome graphs of your progress in keyword rankings + unique feature of Keyword Clustering based on SERP (I haven't seen any competitor tool with this option).
author: Anastasia N.
pros: Every time I'm going to create new page for keywords with almost the same meaning, it saves me tons of time. Instead of going through the SERP and manually checking each keyword result for the same website results in the Google top, I just do 2 clicks and receive keywords clustering results that I use to make decisions when creating new pages and also when dealing with keyword cannibalization issue.
cons: Actually, I preferred more the old design (thankfully, there is an option to go to old interface). It may be a matter of time and habits to get familiar with the new design, I hope it won't take much time or maybe the team of SpySERP will make improvements in the design.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Nataly D.
pros: I am so happy I finally found system that I love. Serp is the best SEO rank tracker module. I love interface and implementation. It is so easy to use . I am getting reports every day on my e-mail and I can easily check my web site ranking without any effort from my site.
cons: I don't see any cons right now. I started loving it from the first day I use it
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best tool for track keywords ranking
description: It's the perfect solution to track the keywords. But they are not using Paypal for the transactions.
author: Chamuditha J.
pros: - We can easily import the keywords - They have a friendly UI. - very lower price for the SERP result than other trackers - They are giving a graph that including the average rank of keywords. - They are providing email notification about our rankings.
cons: - When I check some keywords on my own, they are not in there. - They don't use Paypal. I'm doesn't like to use other payment processors.

description: I found SpySerp to be a versatile and robust search application software. It does a lot of things and can really become one of the best software applications in this area. It does a whole of heavy-lifting in a very simple way. A great choice!!! Highly recommended !!!
author: Pramatha S.
pros: There were several things which I really liked about SpySerp. 1) Once the details were fed into the software during setup, it was very convenient to use. 2) I was extremely impressed with the service. In fact, I got technical help even though it was a Sunday. 3) A modest pricing package for 2000-3000 (keyword lookups per month) can be really good for startups and small businesses.
cons: A little more effort on making the software easy to use will be really great. It did take a good amount of effort to make sense in the first few days. There are still a few things which I could not understand. More elaborate Help files and YouTube videos (in English) may be one of the things that can really help. A few improvements on Graphics and Presentation can also make this software really good.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I love SpySerp and would recommend...

pros: I have been using Spyserp for about a month and all I can say is that I'm really happy with the service - It is not very expensive compared to the other ones and the dashboard is very easy to use and intuitive. I don't usually leave review but I felt like I had to because I'm really happy with it :) Thanks, Chris
